title: Exchange Seats
description: Bảng Seat(id, student). Hoán đổi chỗ ngồi liên tiếp (1↔2, 3↔4...); nếu số lẻ cuối giữ nguyên.
approach: CASE WHEN id%2=1 THEN id+1 ELSE id-1 END ORDER BY id hoặc self join swap.
memoryTip: Exchange seats = odd id swap with id+1, even with id-1.

solutions.python:
# SQL
SELECT
  CASE WHEN id % 2 = 1 AND id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM Seat) THEN id
       WHEN id % 2 = 1 THEN id + 1
       ELSE id - 1 END AS id,
  student
FROM Seat
ORDER BY id;
solutions.cpp:
// SQL
SELECT
  CASE WHEN id % 2 = 1 AND id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM Seat) THEN id
       WHEN id % 2 = 1 THEN id + 1
       ELSE id - 1 END AS id,
  student
FROM Seat
ORDER BY id;
solutions.c:
const char query[] = "SELECT
  CASE WHEN id % 2 = 1 AND id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM Seat) THEN id
       WHEN id % 2 = 1 THEN id + 1
       ELSE id - 1 END AS id,
  student
FROM Seat
ORDER BY id;";

analysis.correctness: Hoán đổi cặp liên tiếp; id lẻ max giữ nguyên khi count lẻ.
